raw_text: rafael 5oosque martínez 618 588 999 / 91 553 89 13 r.bosque.martinez@gmail.com profile aerospace engineer with experience looking for an internship in the middle of my msc to keep growing as professional. have worked for airbus and mtorres and am eager to keep learning. aeronautical engineering is the future: the world depends on safe, easy and environmentally sustainable travel. airbus work actively makes the future a better place, and want to be part of that. work experience airbus defence and space october 2016 - present currently doing an internship in the a330 mrtt final assembly line quality department (taqod) analysing costs of non-quality and kpls. also applying improvement plans and lean philosophy. have developed teamwork skills due to being involved in a multidisciplinary environment including engineering, quality control and production. have also learnt to be flexible and the vision of one of the biggest international companies around the world. mtorres summer 2016 mtorres is a tier 1 company in the world of design of automatic machine tools for the manufacturing of aerospace composite materials. worked in the mechanical design department introducing improvements in 2d and 3d models with catia v5. have proved the reliability and responsibility that a small company with cutting-edge technology requires. education msc in aeronautical engineering 2:1 expected september 2016 - present universidad politécnica de madrid master in professional development october 2016 - present universidad alcala de madrid (online) bachelor in aerospace engineering 2:2 september 2011 - september 2016 universidad politécnica de madrid thesis: study and optimization of a low aspect wing to be used in transonic regime. full marks 10 out of 10 skills. what more can offer? eee highly motivated and diligent, always willing to go the extra mile. showed studying and working concurrently. organised with excellent time management and with the ability to multitask. demonstrated developing independently my thesis after full-time working days in mtorres hardworking and eager to learn and improve. committed to giving my best in my personal and professional lives, as it can be seen day by day in my work or studies. flexible and able to change my objectives quickly as goals change. for example it was denoted when my thesis topic changed increasing difficulty while still reducing resources and time needed. remarkable projects eee thesis (10 out of 10) aerodynamic optimization of a wing geometry with ansys . built a 3d model and parametrized it with 7 variables for later solving with ansys fluent. this project reflects all the skills previously mentioned. wind turbine design (8.5 out of 10) aerodynamic and structural with matlab. learnt how to work in team, cooperate and success even when the team members have different priorities and goals. uav 3d design computer skills catia v5 visual basic excel ansys fluent sap languages english cambridge certificate in advanced english (c1) spanish mother tongue hobbies boxing teaching reading
